chapter_title.en: The transient nature of human existence

text: ١٥٢. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): لِكُلِّ مُقْبِلٍ إِدْبَارٌ، وَمَا أَدْبَرَ كَأَنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 152. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Every comer has to return and after returning it is as though he never existed.
